name: Sky Mad
short_description: Futuristic jet fighter combat racing game.
detailed_description:
Sky Mad is a phenomenal futuristic jet fighter game that has flight simulation style flying based on real aircraft physics.

The objective is to complete stages, and as you complete stages it gets harder but newer and better fighters get unlocked.
You can complete stages by either racing and finishing in first place or by destroying all the other jets.
Some stages are easier to complete by racing and others are easier to complete by destroying, you have to choose what to do with each stage.

In the demo version only the introductory stage (stage 1) is available to play and no locked fighters get unlocked.
In the full version a new fighter gets unlocked every 2 stages completed and there is a total of 12 stages.

Do you think you have what it takes to be the ultimate jet pilot till the end?
Flying can be hard and it may require some real aerial skills to make it through the stages.

Good luck!
